hero.title: Public Accessibility Project-te chu
hero.lead: He register-ah hian IATF kaltlanga public project enkawlte tarlan a ni a. Accessibility project pawmte, site infrastructure leh archived prototypes te chu hetah hian hmuh theihin a awm reng a ni.

intro: Project pawmte chu an chhuah veleh hetah hian tarlan a ni ang.

header.title: Accessibility mamawh tak tak chu public project-a chantîr

paragraphs: IATF chuan mipuite tâna open source hna ṭangkai taka siam theih tûr, mi tinin an mamawh tak takte chu a enfiah ṭhîn a ni.

emptyState.title: Project tihchhuah a la awm lo
paragraphs: IATF chuan a public project set hmasa ber chu a buatsaih mek a ni.
Accessibility mamawh tak tak i neih chuan dilna i thawn thei reng a ni.
